problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
